title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Beyond Wildlife India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Beyond Wildlife India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Beyond Wildlife India are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Beyond Wildlife India:
Beyond Wildlife India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Beyond Wildlife India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
